allow: Bash(python -c "from jeff.bootstrap import run_startup_preflight; [print\(check\) for check in run_startup_preflight\(\)]")

Bash(npx --yes @tauri-apps/cli@2 init --ci --app-name "Jeff" --window-title "Jeff" --frontend-dist "../dist" --dev-url "http://127.0.0.1:5173" --before-dev-command "npm run dev" --before-build-command "npm run build")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 python -m jeff --project project-1 --work wu-1 --command "/run list")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 python -m jeff --project project-1 --work wu-1 --run run-10 --command "/show")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 python -m jeff --project project-1 --work wu-1 --run run-10 --command "/trace")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 python -m jeff --project project-1 --work wu-1 --run run-10 --command "/lifecycle")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 python -m jeff --project project-1 --work wu-1 --run run-10 --command "/selection show")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 python -m jeff --project project-1 --work wu-1 --run run-13 --command "/show")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 python -m jeff --project project-1 --work wu-1 --run run-1 --command "/show")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 python -m jeff --project project-1 --work wu-1 --run run-14 --command "/show")
